UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile for the Sunset Camp application.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

history.description: A log of the user's activities.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a camp booking made by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the booking.

campId.description: The ID of the booked camp.

campName.description: The name of the booked camp.

numberOfPeople.description: The number of people in the booking.

bookingDate.description: The date the booking was made.

UserActivity.title: UserActivity
UserActivity.description: Represents a single activity performed by a user.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the activity occurred.

isAdmin.description: Determines if the user has administrative privileges.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information. The document ID is the user's Firebase Auth UID.

/users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Stores the camp bookings for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/history/{activityId}.description: Stores a log of user activities.
